user.title: Tuya Cloud Credentials
user.description:
Enter your Tuya IoT Platform credentials.

You need an active **IoT Core** and **Smart Lock Open Service** subscription on [iot.tuya.com](https://iot.tuya.com).

select_device.title: Select Lock Device
select_device.description: Choose the lock device you want to control from Home Assistant.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Access ID and Access Secret on iot.tuya.com.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Tuya Cloud API. Check your network and region.
error.remote_unlock_disabled: Remote unlock is not enabled on this device. Enable it in the Tuya or Smart Life app first.

abort.no_devices_found: No lock devices found. Make sure your Smart Life / Tuya app account is linked to your IoT project and your device is a supported lock category.
